title: Pearl Dispenser
description: This mod allows dispensers to shoot ender pearls as if thrown by a player.
body:
![Preview Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2163eafb76d96d0b9c4dc5f1edd07363d5c9429b.gif)

This mod allows dispensers to eject ender pearls as if they were thrown by a player. The pearl will also teleport the player functioning like a normal ender pearl. Which player the pearl teleports is determined by the block above the dispenser.  

**Dragon Head** -> Player who placed the head will own the pearl  
**Player Head** -> Player associated with the head will own the pearl
